16.reason: [Incorrectly decrements n, causing vertex indices to be misaligned. The graph vertices are 0 to n-1, so n should remain unchanged.]

60.reason: [Loop condition should be p < original_n, but n was decremented, so this skips the last vertex or accesses out-of-bound if original n was used correctly.]
